item.title: my Gwen cosplay~ (from Total Drama Island)
item.description:
As always, I made everything myself! Even the wig - which doesn't happen too often - but I really wanted something that looks as natural as possible! *more of my work: https://www.reddit.com/u/aniku_/s/7AeFmN5p1f
bonus: relatable meme I had in my folder :'D

item.title: It’s another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i thought it was an online only truck, hence cyber
hippo babies also
my dad dgaf about anyone's hair
i like most chips aside from the really spicy ones
this made me laugh when i stole it but now it's worrying me. don't drive if you can't see gang
finally
good times
please don't hit your ex with a car
it's ok because she's old
go with word processor
poor hammerhead sharks.. tough to get a good picture/angle
mmm hmm
this picture gives me anxiety
yay
you gotta multi-ply
that cat is too much for me
that’s it for me. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: ATLA dump

he would do this though
I love Katara so much
I have more, but it's "spoilers" for later seasons so will put in a different post. Please do not trash any adaptations, especially the new Netflix one, in here! Positive vibes only.

item.description: Of course learning should be free, college should be free, but this is at least a start and I think it's great!

item.title: Kickin it old school with some bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
I'm like hey, what's up, hello.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Make fun of me @CrimeBrulee
Bottom shelf algorithm break. What does the internet want me to buy today?
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Nastiest fuckin thing I have EVER put inside my mouth.
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! We've been playing Palworld, Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
@FrothyStout
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: 13,000 meals from TheFreePizzaDude
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm TheFreePizzaDude Today we're going to send out the 13,000th meal of this project!!!
Nanna says there are 2 pretty easy ways to get someone food today if you'd like to help -
People in need will comment. Helpers will reply and then DM the requestor to set it up. If you have sent food or if you have any issues or questions, shoot me a DM or a tag!
You can also contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we will send the food for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
PJ is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! Well have helpers on the post until 5pm central
12,985 meals since we started 805 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Pizza Tally 105 1st, 2nd and 3rd by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 205 4th, 5th, 6th, & 7th by @OP 240 8th, 9th, 10th, & 11th by @OP 255 12th & 13th by Pizza Angel @Facetimewithme 300 14th & 15th AKA OH WOW HOLY TOLEDO MEAL # 13,000!!!!!! by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 310 16th by Pizza Angel @invalidGiraffeDancer 320 17th & 18th by Pizza Angel @meisa1291 400 19th, 20th, 21st and 22nd by @OP 420 Blaze it Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @grim42 440 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @grim42 450 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @yummilicious 520 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 540 31st by Pizza Angel @GuyPilot 600 32nd, 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @grim42 ... Today's Grocery Tally 355 1st by Grocery Angel @grim42 ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 34 meals Filled one huge grocery order That's 13,019 meals since we started 806 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: From early 2022.
item.description: Don't you HATE when all usernames are already taken?
item.dc:creator: DontYouHateWhenAllUsernamesAreAlreadyTaken

item.title: Borderlands Body Paints on myself using a mirror - mcroft07
item.description:
I saw that some of my work has been posted on here without credit so thought I might as well post it myself ?? :) Painted using a mirror (and brushes). I know a lot of people say my style is very borderlands so thought I would share my Borderlands posts! If you wanted to follow me on social media, I'm Mcroft07 everywhere and I paint these live on Twitch.tv/mcroft07
Maya again, but with the same style mashup as Moxxi. After so many Borderlands paints, I was actually approached by 2k to do a paint for them! They gave me free reign and I decided to paint this since I've done so many Borderlands paints before. It's meant to represent Maya and Krieg's relationship. I covered the eye with cling film/plastic wrap, dissolved the edges (it's attached to my skin with medical glue). Because this was commissioned I'll just write [ad] to make sure I don't get in trouble though! Hope you like my thread of Borderlands paints :) If you ever want to see me paint any of these live, www.twitch.tv/mcroft07. And as some of you asked, my socials are all: Instagram: www.instagram.com/mcroft07 Twitter: www.twitter.com/MCroft07 Tiktok: www.tiktok.com/@mcroft07
Lilith Body Paint, I made the collar piece out of upholstery foam, covered it in latex and painted it to match after sticking it to myself. I also made the wig from a cheap £8 one from amazon and sprayed the edges. One of my first few times styling wigs, I was really proud of it!
This one was a Tiny Tina body paint I actually was commissioned to paint by AMD and Corsair which was pretty cool. A few years back now. Thats why on her DnD hat, I included some CPU's and logos. So I guess I should mark this as [ad] just in case I get sued lol
I know I've had a lot of people ask me to paint Moxxi. I love her design! I wanted to change it up a little bit and mash it up with a psycho mask since I find those really fun to paint. So thought this would be a cool mashup :)
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Hot Saturday night cleaning my room(I’m taking a break rn)
item.description:
The next time I actually want to date someone, I’m using this.
It’s not a waifu house, it’s a waifu home.
Started a dream journal recently & not into how often this awful rollercoaster/light rail combo between cities shows up.
Spring feels like it’s for strange noodles
Oh god no one make me immortal
He ain’t liking how often I’m singing jingles about my turn radius
Feeling very called out by whoever photoshopped these 4 photos of me together.
Heading to the faewild. Y’all need anything?
When did we stop naming folks Knife? We used to be a proper country.
Nana didn’t want sweets, so she got birthday guacamole.
Just three bonkers cute hats I crocheted for my friend’s kids.
item.dc:creator: kgblueberry

item.title: Art Nouveau doorways are delightful
item.description: Art Nouveau doorways are delightful. Like this one in Brussels, designed by Ernest Delune in 1893 for the house of a famous glass maker. And there are plenty more just like it...
